content.en:
"Breakthrough, king!"

Ye Tian didn't have much excitement, he was originally the ultimate supreme being, but an ancient demon-level existence, and now he only broke through to the king level, this strength is nothing.

After breaking through to the king level, Ye Tian continued to retreat for a period of time and stabilized his cultivation realm.

Soon, Tuo~ Elder came to visit Ye Tian.

"Elder Tian, congratulations!"

Elder Tuo congratulated.

In the Eagle Ministry, all king-level existences have the title of elder, and Ye Tian has already broken through to the king-level, so he is naturally an elder.

"Elder Tuo is polite!"

Ye Tian smiled.

After that, the two chatted for a while, and Elder Tuo still needed to guard Area 1 before leaving.

And Ye Tian immediately left the Nome vein and returned to the Eagle Ministry, he needed to go to the Eagle Department and accept the appointment of the elders.

......

Eagle Ministry.

After Ye Tian came back, he saw the patriarch Heying for the first time.

"God, you are amazing, you have broken through to the king level so quickly, it seems that you will become an emperor level in the future, and there is even hope to become an ancient demon level!"

Tsurukage praised frantically.

After that, Tsurukage began to perform the ceremony of appointing elders for Ye Tian.

And the news that Ye Tian had broken through to become a king-level soon spread throughout the tribe.

For a moment, many clansmen were shocked.

"What, Tian has broken through to the king level and is about to become an elder?"

Sui was shocked.

As a person of the same age, he is still at the level of a soldier, and he is still a lot worse than the general level, of course, he has already completed the coming-of-age ceremony, but if he can compare with Ye Tian, the gap is too big.

"Oh the sky!"

Then the others exclaimed.

Soon, the elder ceremony was held, and this time the elder ceremony was held, and the only emperor-level existence in the clan, He Lao, appeared.

"I've seen He Lao!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He Lao nodded slightly and said, "Very good, another elder was born in the clan!"

As the only emperor-level in the clan, he naturally hopes that the clan will become stronger and stronger, and the more elders the better, and it is best to give birth to a few emperor-ranks.

Otherwise, he wouldn't be able to leave the clan.

There are also many enemies in the Eagle Tribe, if he leaves the clan, the enemy knows about it, and he will definitely invade as soon as possible, including some wandering clans.

Therefore, he must stay in the clan, and if there is an additional emperor, he can share the pressure for him.

And now, with the talent Ye Tian showing, there should be no problem at the emperor level.

He was looking forward to the day when Ye Tian would break through to the emperor level.

After the elder ceremony ended, Ye Tian officially became an elder of the Eagle Tribe.

The Nome vein, the two elders guarded the Nome vein a bit of a waste, and Elder Tuo has been guarding the Nome vein, which is deeply rooted, and it is not easy for him to manage the Nome vein as a new elder.

Therefore, the patriarch suggested that he go somewhere else, and there was no need to guard the Nome vein.

Of course, the patriarch rewarded him with a lot of things, including the gold of Noam.

this day.

Ye Tian came to Dongmu River, this is another relatively important industry of the Eagle Department, which was guarded by many top generals before, and there are a large number of formations shrouded in it.

Now that Ye Tian has come here, many generals are relieved, and there is no need to be nervous all the time.

"Meet Elder Heaven!"

"Meet Elder Heaven!"

"Meet Elder Heaven!"

Many generals and soldiers said respectfully.

Ye Tian said.

Soon, a general-level general told Ye Tian about the situation of Dongmuhe carefully.

The Dongmu River is a very long river, and this river is quite rich in resources, which is rich in a kind of Dongmu River sand material, and also has a kind of flowing ancient marrow liquid resources, once these two resources are found, they must be collected as soon as possible, so as to be sent back to the clan.

The value of the Muhe sand in the Middle East is second only to the gold of Nome, and the streamer ancient marrow liquid can improve the general-level body, and even has a certain effect on the king level, but the birth of the streamer ancient marrow liquid is not regular, and it may not be able to be found.

It is precisely because there is no law that it does not attract the You Clan to snatch wildly, if there is a rule, I am afraid that the king-level You Clan will come to do it.

After learning about the situation in Dongmuhe, Ye Tian asked them to go about everything as usual, and don't bother him if there is no big matter.

He continued to retreat and cultivate, and then took out the stone from Black Mountain to study the Ultimate Rule Realm.

At the same time, he is also improving his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule.

In fact, in a short period of time, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule had reached more than a hundred realms, after all, it was a recultivation, and it was easier to improve.

However, now that he is improving the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws, he is also continuing to improve his ultimate ten thousand laws ultimate way, and as the ultimate way of ten thousand laws is perfected, the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws also have a certain slight change.

And this slight change also made him more careful and careful in his understanding, so as to lay a stronger foundation.

And when it came to perfecting the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws, the Ancient Demon Inheritance of the Fox Yi Ancient Demon was of great help to him, making his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao even stronger.

In the blink of an eye, a relatively long period of time has passed.

this day.

A new general-level existence came to Dongmuhe's side, and it was Ye Tian's acquaintance - Sui.

"Elder Heaven!"

Sui came here and reported to Ye Tian.

"Sui, how did you come to this side of the Dongmu River?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Sui said, "Elder Tian, I know you're here, so I took the initiative to apply to come here to garrison. "

"Then you can stay in this area, it's a little safer here. "

Ye Tian arranged.

Afterwards, Sui went to the place he had arranged to guard the town.

Of course, Ye Tian also gave a lot of care to this former partner, and even gave him resource support, making his strength stronger.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian's strength has steadily improved, and his physical body, ultimate rules, and life patterns are all constantly improving.

He originally wanted to steadily improve like this, cultivate to the limit of the king level, and then hit the emperor level.

However, some people don't want him to rise so steadily.

Now.

A tribe not too far from the Eagle Department - the Worm Department!

This tribe is good at controlling all kinds of insect creatures, and although the population is small, its strength is not weak, and it is the enemy of the Eagle Department.

And the Insect Department has only one Emperor Rank, but the strength of this Emperor is much weaker than the Emperor level of the Eagle Department, which causes the Insect Department to dare not attack the Eagle Department.

However, Ye Tian was too demonic, and this information was naturally obtained by the insect department.

The insect department didn't want the Eagle Department to give birth to a second emperor, so it naturally wanted to kill Ye Tian.

The Zerg also knew Ye Tian's information in Dongmu River, but with so many formations, plus a king-level controlling these formations, even if it was an emperor-level, it would take a few breaths to break through the formation.

If the Emperor of the Eagle Department used some kind of treasure to come as soon as possible, he might be able to save Ye Tian.

Therefore, in order to ensure that Ye Tian is killed, their insect department must find another emperor-level person who is involved in the Eagle Department's Emperor-level He Laokou!.
